channel.title: Ashraf El Desoky – Articles
channel.description: Articles and insights on project management, telecommunications, and digital transformation

item.title: Earned Value Management: A Complete Guide
item.description: Master EVM fundamentals — PV, EV, AC, CPI, SPI — and learn how to use them to forecast project health with real-world examples.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: FTTH Network Rollout: Lessons from 10 Years with STC
item.description: Key lessons from managing one of the largest FTTH rollout programmes in the Middle East — planning, execution, and challenges.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Building a High-Performance PMO: A Framework for Excellence
item.description: A practical framework for establishing and maturing a Project Management Office that drives organizational success — from governance to KPIs.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: Digital Transformation in Construction: From Paper to Platform
item.description: How traditional construction and telecom companies can leverage digital tools — ERP, BIM, and automation — to transform operations and boost productivity.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: 5G Infrastructure Rollout: Project Management Challenges & Solutions
item.description: Managing 5G network deployment at scale — site acquisition, RF planning, vendor coordination, and the risk management strategies that keep rollout on track.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky
